## Diagram 2

```mermaid
sequenceDiagram
    participant Script as test.sh
    participant Env as Environment
    participant Python as Python Interpreter
    participant Test as api_lambda_test.py
    
    Script->>Env: set -e (enable error exit)
    Script->>Env: export AWS_STAGE=prod-b
    Script->>Env: set PYTHONPATH
    Script->>Python: Execute with PYTHONPATH
    Python->>Test: Run api_lambda_test.py
    Test-->>Python: Return exit code
    Python-->>Script: Exit code
    alt Exit code == 0
        Script->>Script: Echo success message
    else Exit code != 0
        Script->>Script: Exit with error (set -e)
    end
```
